title: Speeches - Lord Holmes of Richmond MBE
meta_description: Chris is active in the Lords. His speeches cover a number of policy areas including: digital infrastructure, new technologies and skills.
headings: h2: Read or Watch Chris’s speeches in Parliament
text_excerpt: Speeches - Lord Holmes of Richmond MBE Lord Holmes of Richmond MBE Paralympian, Parliamentarian, Public Speaker Menu About Chris Public Speaking Parliament Speeches Select Committees Peers in Schools Campaigns Accessibility Diversity and Inclusion Shared Space Sport Social Mobility – End Unpaid Internships Digital News Contact Search for: Speeches Second Reading of AI (Regulation) Private Members Bill in March 2024. The Bill got through all Parliamentary Stages in the House of Lords and then was lost when the General Election was called and Parliament dissolved. Chris reintroduced the same Bill in March 2025. Introducing his Private Members Bill to end unpaid internships January 2020 Chris is active in the Lords. His contributions cover a number of policy areas including: digital infrastructure and new technologies, employment, skills, sports, culture, transport and disability and inclusion. Read or Watch Chris’s speeches in Parliament The official record of all Parliamentary activity, Hansard provides a searchable database of all debates, questions and votes in Parliament. Please see below for all Chris’s speeches in the House of Lords since he became a member in 2013. Spoken contributions Parliament TV More about Chris’s work in Parliament.
